behavior_summary: This script implements a campfire object that: (1) provides a short 'campfire' label when the player inspects it (U8P_CAMPFIRE::look), (2) starts/stops an ambient campfire sound when actors enter/leave a fast trigger region, and (3) responds to being hit by forwarding damage/interaction to a referenced target (NPC or item) and by producing small delayed ember/projectile effects that can also damage/overlap a target.
U8P_CAMPFIRE::enterFastArea begins an ambient SFX on the campfire; U8P_CAMPFIRE::leaveFastArea stops that SFX.

U8P_CAMPFIRE::gotHit takes an item/NPC reference parameter, branches on whether the reference is an NPC or an item, forwards a randomized hit to NPCs, or triggers item-specific behavior (Item::use for certain types or Item::explode if explosive). It also triggers a delayed helper to spawn transient ember/projectile effects.

U8P_CAMPFIRE::func018C implements the delayed effect: it waits for a randomized delay, spawns a transient process (spawn ->FREE::func1C19), waits again, checks overlap with the target parameter, and if overlapping applies a small randomized hit via Item::receiveHit.
notable_control_flow: U8P_CAMPFIRE::look (process): immediate bark/display of 'campfire' then suspend; minimal UI/inspection flow.
U8P_CAMPFIRE::enterFastArea (process): single external call playAmbientSFX(this, 0x32, 0x0086) to start looped ambient sound when an actor enters the trigger region.
U8P_CAMPFIRE::leaveFastArea (process): single external call stopSFX(this, 0x0086) to stop the ambient sound when leaving the trigger region.

U8P_CAMPFIRE::gotHit (process uword, word): copies param1 to local temporaries, checks Item::isNpc(local1). If true, calls Item::receiveHit with flags and randomized magnitude and schedules U8P_CAMPFIRE::func018C for delayed ember effects. If false, calls Item::getType(local1) and branches: certain type IDs cause Item::use to be invoked (spawn/process) while an else-if checks Item::isExplosive to call Item::explode.

U8P_CAMPFIRE::func018C (function): performs two suspends around a spawn with randomized delay (temp = 0x40 + urandom(0x40) <=> spawn ->FREE::func1C19), then checks Item::overlaps(param1, this) and, if overlapping, calls Item::receiveHit with a small randomized amount.
open_questions: What specific in-game objects correspond to the type IDs checked in U8P_CAMPFIRE::gotHit (e.g., 0x0243 and 0x0250) — their semantic meaning is not present in the script.

What is the exact behavior of the spawned FREE::func1C19 process (visual-only ember vs. damaging projectile)? The script spawns it and later uses overlaps but the spawned process internals are external.
What are the exact semantics of the U8P_CAMPFIRE::gotHit second parameter (word) — the disassembly shows two params but only the first is clearly referenced in the logic.
Are the randomized delays and damage values tuned for visible ember effects or game balance? Magnitudes are small (urandom ranges) but context (difficulty/HP) is unknown.

main_function.name: U8P_CAMPFIRE::look
main_function.purpose: Provide the short label/description when the player inspects the campfire ('campfire') and then suspend the U8P_CAMPFIRE::look process.
entry_conditions: Triggered when the player uses the 'U8P_CAMPFIRE::look' / inspect action on the campfire object.

function_map.name: U8P_CAMPFIRE::enterFastArea
function_map.role: fast-area entry trigger to start ambient SFX

function_map.name: U8P_CAMPFIRE::leaveFastArea
function_map.role: fast-area exit trigger to stop ambient SFX

function_map.name: U8P_CAMPFIRE::gotHit
function_map.role: handle external hits to the campfire, forward damage, trigger item-specific reactions and delayed ember effects

function_map.name: U8P_CAMPFIRE::func018C
function_map.role: delayed helper implementing spawn/suspend and overlap test to apply a small secondary hit (ember/projectile)

internal_calls.purpose: Schedule/invoke the delayed ember/projectile helper after forwarding a hit to an NPC target so a secondary delayed effect can occur.

external_calls.purpose: Start the campfire ambient sound effect attached to this object (sound id 0x32, sfx handle 0x0086).
Test whether the provided reference param1 is an NPC to choose NPC-vs-item handling.
Apply a randomized hit to a target NPC/item with computed direction and flags (used for both immediate and delayed hits).
Compute direction from the campfire (this) to the target for receiveHit.
Generate small random numbers for damage variation and spawn timing.
Query an item's type to branch to Item::use for certain types.
Invoke the 'use' process on certain item types when the campfire hits them.
Check if the hit item should explode and, if so, call Item::explode.
Trigger an explosion on an explosive item hit by the campfire.
Spawn a transient/free process ->FREE::func1C19 after a randomized delay to represent an ember/projectile.
Test whether the spawned transient or the campfire overlaps the target param1 before applying the delayed hit.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: This script implements a campfire object that: (1) provides a short 'campfire' label when the player inspects it (U8P_CAMPFIRE::look), (2) starts/stops an ambient campfire sound when actors enter/leave a fast trigger region, and (3) responds to being hit by forwarding damage/interaction to a referenced target (NPC or item) and by producing small delayed ember/projectile effects that can also damage/overlap a target.
